chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3200 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 13624/2021 2. For hearing of main case 20.03.2025 Mr. Ali Raza advocate holds brief for Mr. Arshad Husain, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Shahid Ali Qureshi, advocate for respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General It is jointly stated that the lis is squarely covered by an order of Division Bench of this Court dated 11.01.2023, in the case of Younus Textile Mills Ltd. vs. Federation of Pakistan and others (CP D 5899 of 2021) and other connected matters and in view hereof this petition may be dismissed subject to the right of the petitioner to seek appellate recourse. Order accordingly. Petition is dismissed as aforesaid. Judge Judge Amjad
